headline: If You’d Invested $10,000 In Lockheed Martin When The Iran Conflict Started, Here’s How Much You’d Have Now
summary: Defense stocks are supposed to surge when conflict breaks out, yet Lockheed Martin investors who bought in on the first day of the Iran war got a painful education in why geopolitics rarely works as a stock thesis.

raw.headline: If You’d Invested $10,000 In Lockheed Martin When The Iran Conflict Started, Here’s How Much You’d Have Now

headline: The Iran War Hasn’t Helped Defense Stocks. Maybe Earnings Can.
summary: Expectations for defense earnings are low. That isn’t the case for commercial aerospace earnings, though.

headline: L3Harris Technologies (LHX) Receives FAA Contract to Upgrade Aircraft Tracking Network
summary: L3Harris Technologies, Inc. (NYSE:LHX) is one of the Best Space Technology Stocks to Buy Now. Recently, on July 1, L3Harris Technologies, Inc. (NYSE:LHX) announced receiving an FAA contract to upgrade and operate the nation’s aircraft tracking network through 2045. ​Management noted that under this contract, the company will modernize more than 700 ground stations.
